analysis.reasoning: Core message: China will hold a video conference with officials from 20+ African countries and Africa CDC to share COVID-19 information, asserting that China and Africa have long supported each other and will continue to do so. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no mention or contrast with the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Yes; emphasizes cooperation, support, sharing expertise, and ongoing mutual assistance with Africa, fitting the benevolent, multilateral, mutually beneficial framing. CH3 (epic history) – Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values, domestically) – Not discussed; focus is external cooperation, not domestic system. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – No explicit claim about domestic achievements or leadership superiority; only cooperation. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
